name: Fair Cell
explanation: An 8-bit sampler in the Fairlight CMI lineage. It plays a baked, self-authored CC0 sample - a morphing formant-vocal 'aah-to-ooh' tone, bit-crushed to 8-bit for the gritty digital Fairlight character - pitched across the keyboard with an amp envelope and a resonant low-pass. The signature Crunch re-crushes the playback for even more of that early-digital-sampler grain. 6-voice poly. Controls: Tune, Cutoff, Decay, Crunch, Attack and Level.
